messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Count and surface violations of standing engineering rules — an unmeasured rule silently stops holding
What it solves: HE IS ASKING TWO THINGS, AND THE SECOND IS THE DURABLE ONE:
  1. A NUMBER, NOW — how often have the BL-252 / BL-255 rules actually been breached since they
     landed?
  2. AN OBSERVABLE, FOREVER — put that count in the daily briefing email, so a rule that is
     quietly being violated SHOWS UP r…
How it works: A standing rule's violations since it landed are counted from history

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-337 - Count and surface violations of standing engineering rules — an unmeasured rule silently stops holding is complete.
